channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mr Tumble star Justin Fletcher seen arriving at hotel with co-star amid relationship reports
item.description: Television presenter Justin Fletcher, widely known for his CBeebies character Mr Tumble, has been reported to be in a relationship with his co-star Samantha Dorrance, who plays Tootsie on the same chi...

item.title: US Disables Gambia-Flagged Cargo Ship After Ignoring Iran Blockade Warnings
item.description: The US military disabled a Gambia-flagged cargo ship, the M/V Lian Star, on May 29 after it ignored more than 20 warnings not to enter Iranian waters. According to US Central Command (CENTCOM), a miss...

item.title: Auto parts sector assesses potential changes to U.S. content rules under CUSMA framework
item.description: The North American auto parts industry is closely examining proposed changes to content requirements under the Canada-United States-Mexico Agreement (CUSMA), particularly a suggestion from U.S. policy...

item.title: US–South Africa diplomatic tensions escalate after exchange over MAGA remarks and State Department criticism
item.description: Relations between South Africa and the United States have deteriorated further following a sharp public exchange between Pretoria and Washington. The US State Department’s Bureau of African Affairs ac...

item.title: Rabid bat found near sidewalk prompts public health warning in Fremont, California
item.description: Health officials in Fremont, California, have issued a public warning after a bat found near a neighborhood sidewalk tested positive for rabies. The bat was discovered on May 26 near Palo Verde Common...

item.title: Islamabad considered as possible venue for US-Iran peace agreement signing amid ongoing US-Iran negotiations
item.description: Diplomatic sources in Washington and at the United Nations have indicated that Islamabad is still being considered as a potential host city for the formal signing ceremony of a possible US-Iran peace ...

item.title: Latrell Mitchell ruled out of Origin II, Moses expected to return at five-eighth
item.description: Injured South Sydney centre Latrell Mitchell will miss the second State of Origin clash in Melbourne, ruling him out of NSW selection. Mitchell sustained a back injury against the Knights, which cause...

item.title: The Central Role of Marriage in Sustaining Dowry and Gender Inequality in India
item.description: The article argues that India’s recurring dowry-related tragedies cannot be understood only as a problem of dowry practices or domestic violence, but must be viewed in the wider context of the dominan...

item.title: Emergency C-section saves newborn gorilla at Seattle zoo with help from veterinary and human medical team
item.description: A western lowland gorilla named Olympia at Seattle’s Woodland Park Zoo has given birth to a healthy baby boy following an extremely rare emergency caesarean section. The intervention was carried out o...

item.title: Fuel Truck Rollover at Billy Bishop Airport Causes Limited Operational Disruptions
item.description: A fuel truck rollover occurred at Billy Bishop Toronto City Airport on May 30, 2026, prompting an emergency response and causing some disruption to airport operations. According to reports, the incide...

item.title: Centretown Park to undergo revitalization to improve community space
item.description: Ottawa's Centretown Park is set to undergo a significant revitalization project aimed at enhancing the green space and amenities for local residents and visitors. The project will focus on upgrading i...

item.title: Two men convicted of second-degree murder for Alberta roadside shooting
item.description: A jury in Alberta found Arthur Penner and Elijah Strawberry guilty of second-degree murder for the fatal shooting of Colin Hough, 45, on a rural road east of Calgary on August 6, 2024. Hough, an emplo...

item.title: Supreme Court Rules Child's Right to Know Biological Father Supersedes Privacy Concerns
item.description: In a significant verdict, the Supreme Court of India has emphasised that a child’s right to know about his biological father takes precedence over an adult’s right to privacy concerning DNA testing. A...

item.title: Spurs defeat Thunder in Game 7 to reach NBA Finals against Knicks
item.description: The San Antonio Spurs have advanced to the NBA Finals after defeating the reigning champion Oklahoma City Thunder 111-103 in a decisive Game 7 of the Western Conference Finals. Led by Victor Wembanyam...

item.title: Lilita Gcwabe recognised with National Press Club-Unisa Community Journalism Award
item.description: Cape Town journalist Lilita Gcwabe, working with Independent Media and Elitsha News, has been awarded the National Press Club-University of South Africa (NPC-Unisa) Journalist of the Year for Communit...

item.title: Five killed in Virginia I-95 crash en route to wedding; bus driver charged
item.description: A tragic highway crash in Stafford County, Virginia, left five people dead and dozens more injured on Friday, according to police. Among the victims was the Doncev family, who were traveling overnight...

item.title: NCRPO and OSAA coordinate to maintain security and order at Senate for Sara Duterte impeachment trial
item.description: The National Capital Region Police Office (NCRPO) is working closely with the Office of the Sergeant-at-Arms (OSAA) to ensure safety, order, and effective crowd control outside the Senate as Vice Pres...

item.title: Turkiye says Israel can join regional platform if Palestinian state recognised on 1967 borders
item.description: Turkiye’s Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan has stated that Israel could be included in a proposed regional cooperative platform if it recognises a Palestinian state based on the 1967 borders. Speaking in ...

item.title: Court Grants Bail to 15 Chinese and Nine Nigerians Over Alleged Illegal Lithium Mining in Nasarawa
item.description: For Nasarawa matter, 15 Chinese and nine Nigerians don waka go Federal High Court, Abuja, over una involvement for illegal lithium mining. Dem arrest on May 16, 2026, for Kokona Local Government Area,...

item.title: Marilyn Monroe lookalike gathering in California aims to break Australian record
item.description: Hundreds of Marilyn Monroe lookalikes have gathered in California in an effort to set a new world record for the largest gathering of people dressed as the iconic Hollywood star. The event has drawn p...
